dom.title: Standalone 9×9 Go Board
dom.body_text_excerpt: Standalone • 9×9 • Go / Baduk / Weiqi Play Go in one file Click an intersection to place a stone. This standalone board enforces captures, suicide, and board repetition (ko via positional superko), supports passing, undo, and restart, and shows a live area estimate with 6.5 komi for White. Black to play MOVE 0 CONSECUTIVE PASSES 0 Black to play. Click any intersection to place a stone. BLACK CAPTURES 0 WHITE CAPTURES 0 Pass Undo New game BLACK AREA 0 0 stones + 0 territory WHITE AREA 6.5 0 stones + 0 territory + 6.5 komi Current area estimate: White leads by 6.5. Area estimate uses simple territory detection and assumes dead groups have already been captured. Two consecutive passes end the game. Click near any intersection; a preview stone shows the current turn. Coordinates skip the letter I, following common Go notation. Undo rewinds the last move or pass.
status_lines: Click an intersection to place a stone. This standalone board enforces captures, suicide, and board repetition (ko via positional superko), supports passing, undo, and restart, and shows a live area estimate with 6.5 komi for White.

Area estimate uses simple territory detection and assumes dead groups have already been captured.
